title: Location
value: La Foret, Black Forest region of Colorado

title: Description
value: Be it known to all unto whom these summons come that the Black Falcon School of Arms shall host its annual Deed of Arms, the Tournoi du Faucon Noir.

title: Theming Rule 1
value: Members of the BFSA (knights or squires) shall either be dressed as wildmen or wildwomen, or bear some decoration or token that marks them as being on the 'woodsy' team.

title: Theming Rule 2
value: All visitors from other schools (knights or squires) shall be dressed as Sir Gawain of the Arthurian tale.

title: Theming Rule 3
value: Each of the dedans shall have their own style under which to be announced during the official Deed.

title: Engagement Rule 1
value: All normal rules of the Tournoi du Faucon Noir shall be observed.

title: Engagement Rule 2
value: Unless eating, sleeping, or teaching, no member of the dedans shall refuse a formal challenge.

title: Engagement Rule 3
value: Each member of the dedans shall conceive of their own thought a specific challenge for which they shall award a token.

title: Engagement Rule 4
value: In the Knights' Deed, the dedans must meet any challenge while armed de arma silvae.

title: Engagement Rule 5
value: Each dehors challenger in the Squire's Deed may request that their opponent fight with a woodwose weapon.

title: Engagement Rule 6
value: At the end of the Deed, all members of the defending dedans shall assemble and choose who should be considered First Among Equals.
